text: [@image:#1:Screenshot_20260222_193910_Instagram] please give her real angel wings, you can give me a few options to choose from, but i want it to feel real. also you can play with whether they are fully visible, or more of an essence, make sure you dont make changes to the image itself. and make sure you do not change her face in any way.
I'll create several options for you with real angel wings, carefully preserving her face and the original image while exploring different wing styles and visibility levels.

artifact.prompt_text: Add large, realistic white feathered angel wings behind the woman. The wings should be fully visible, majestic and detailed with natural feather texture, extending outward from her back. Keep her face, body, clothing, and all other elements of the image completely unchanged. Only add the wings.

Add ethereal, semi-transparent angel wings behind the woman. The wings should have a soft, glowing essence quality - partially visible with a luminous, dreamlike appearance. Realistic feather details but with translucent, heavenly glow. Keep her face, body, clothing, and all other elements completely unchanged. Only add the wings.

Add realistic angel wings that are partially folded and partially visible behind the woman. The wings should appear natural, with detailed white and cream-colored feathers, some parts clearly visible while other parts are subtly tucked or fading into soft light. Keep her face, body, clothing, and all other elements completely unchanged. Only add the wings.

Add subtle, essence-like angel wings behind the woman. The wings should be more of a spiritual presence - soft white light forming the suggestion of wings with delicate feather wisps, barely there but unmistakably angelic. Keep her face, body, clothing, and all other elements completely unchanged. Only add the wings.

text:
Perfect! I've created 4 different options for you, each with a unique approach to the angel wings:

**Option 1** - Fully visible, majestic wings with detailed feather texture extending outward

**Option 2** - Ethereal, semi-transparent wings with a soft, glowing essence and luminous quality

**Option 3** - Partially folded wings, some parts clearly visible while others subtly fade into light

**Option 4** - Subtle essence-style wings, more of a spiritual presence with delicate feather wisps

All versions preserve her face and the original image exactly as is - only the wings have been added. Which style resonates with you most, or would you like me to refine any of these directions?
